title: Podzol to Dirt
description: This plugin allows you to turn podzol into dirt by tilling it, if the podzol is underneath something, it'll turn it into coarse dirt instead.
body:
Using any hoe, you can till podzol into dirt, with a special case of turning it into coarse dirt if something is over top the podzol. there is no plans to make future improvements or changes to this plugin

there is no performance impact caused by this and it should work with any version mc and bukkit/spigot/paper.
